title: Leather
questions: What's the difference between leather and suede?
Would you be happy to buy artificial leather products instead of real leather goods?
Would you buy products that use other animal skins, like crocodile, snake, rabbit, etc?
How important has leather been in technology in our history?
What do you think of fashion companies like Louis Vuitton and Gucci using ostrich leather?
Leather has a place in modern culture, e.g. cowboys, heavy metal music, etc. Does it play a role in your country's culture?
Some religions and cultures avoid leather. Do you know what they are and why they do so?
Do you do anything to care for your leather goods?
Would you like to take up leather-working as a hobby?
What new uses do you think there are for leather?
